title: Auto-resolve snippet agent/harness context from active session metadata
description: Replace manual snippetAgentSlug reliance with session-derived agent/harness identity (Codex/Claude/ACP variants), keeping settings override as fallback.

title: Add snippet execution path for insertable snippet stacks
description: Current milestone inserts snippets into composer only. Add explicit execute workflow that can run one or more queued snippets against active session/tooling while preserving manual review controls.

title: Integrate GenUI Into AgentCockpit (ACP + Codex)
description: Add first-class GenUI surface rendering in the existing protocol pipeline without breaking legacy gateway behavior.
acceptance_criteria: GenUI routing is explicit and schema-driven; ACP and Codex both map GenUI events; Work canvas renders native SwiftUI GenUI surfaces; non-GenUI events remain unchanged; feature can be disabled by config.

title: Define GenUI trigger contract and payload schema
description: Document/implement the canonical trigger envelope for GenUI (tool/method/kind), schema versioning, and validation rules in cockpit adapter layer.
acceptance_criteria: Single contract accepted for ACP and Codex; invalid payload reasons are explicit; no heuristic parsing from plain text.

title: Gate: GenUI integration ready for cockpit rollout
description: Final readiness gate for implementation evidence, manual QA on iPhone/iPad, and protocol compatibility signoff.
acceptance_criteria: All dependent beads closed; iOS build passes; ACP and Codex demo payloads render and interact successfully; rollback path documented.

title: Baseline pi-acp compatibility matrix (ameno-/pi-acp)
description: Capture actual ameno-/pi-acp ACP method/event shapes (initialize/session/list/new/prompt/update, errors, ids, timestamps) and map deltas against current cockpit ACP assumptions.
acceptance_criteria: Written compatibility matrix exists and is used as source-of-truth for adapter/transport changes; all known payload variants enumerated with fixtures.

title: Implement pi-acp ACP compatibility in transport + adapter
description: Update ACSessionTransport/AppModel ACP parsing to handle pi-acp method/param/result/update variants while preserving existing ACP behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Cockpit can create/list/prompt against ameno-/pi-acp and parse session/update variants deterministically without regressions.

title: Add pi-acp integration harness and end-to-end verification
description: Add deterministic fixture/e2e checks against a local pi-acp instance proving connection lifecycle, session flow, GenUI routing, and fallback handling.
acceptance_criteria: Automated verification passes for pi-acp: initialize -> session/list/new -> prompt -> update -> render path; failures are actionable.

title: Add pi-acp endpoint profile in Settings UX
description: Provide preset/default endpoint profile for pi-acp in Settings (scheme/port/path/protocol) so mobile onboarding is one-tap.
acceptance_criteria: User can select pi-acp profile and connect without manual field-by-field setup.

title: Add GenUI event model to canvas domain
description: Extend CanvasEvent with GenUIEvent shape (surface id/version/root/nodes/theme/patch metadata) and parsing helpers.
acceptance_criteria: CanvasEvent supports .genUI with stable ids; model is Sendable; compile passes with existing event cases.

title: Map ACP session/update notifications to GenUI events
description: Extend JSONRPCEventAdapter.mapACP to detect GenUI contract kinds and emit .genUI events; keep current ACP tool/reasoning mappings intact.
acceptance_criteria: ACP GenUI notification fixture maps to .genUI; non-GenUI ACP notifications map exactly as before.

title: Map Codex item notifications/tool outputs to GenUI events
description: Extend JSONRPCEventAdapter.mapCodex to detect GenUI payloads in item streams and emit .genUI events with deterministic ids.
acceptance_criteria: Codex GenUI fixture (item/started+item/completed) maps correctly; existing command/file/reasoning mappings are unchanged.

title: Add GenUI merge/upsert behavior in AgentEventStore
description: Implement patch/snapshot merge strategy for GenUI events keyed by surface id, preserving bounded history and digest updates.
acceptance_criteria: Surface patch updates replace/merge correct prior event; no duplicate explosion; event cap behavior unchanged.

title: Implement native SwiftUI GenUI renderer and route card
description: Create GenUISurfaceCard + renderer mapping from GenUI component types to mobile-focused SwiftUI primitives, then wire EventCardRouter.
acceptance_criteria: At least v0 core components render on iPhone/iPad layouts; EventCardRouter handles .genUI; fallback UI shown for unsupported nodes.

title: Wire GenUI action callbacks to protocol transport
description: Route UI interactions (button/select/form actions) back through ACSessionTransport with protocol-specific request envelopes.
acceptance_criteria: At least one interactive action round-trips for ACP and Codex; transport errors are surfaced in UI/state.

title: Add GenUI feature flag, observability, and safe fallback
description: Introduce settings toggle/kill-switch, structured debug logging, and fallback to RawOutput when schema or renderer validation fails.
acceptance_criteria: Flag disables GenUI routing cleanly; invalid payload never crashes Work view; fallback includes reason metadata.

title: Build fixture-based verification for ACP and Codex GenUI paths
description: Add parser/adapter/store tests (or deterministic fixture harness) covering ACP and Codex GenUI snapshots/patches and non-GenUI regression cases.
acceptance_criteria: Automated checks prove ACP+Codex GenUI mapping works and legacy mappings stay stable.
